node.data: {"M10105":{"lit":"ճան<lb xml:id=\"l104436792\" facs=\"#z104436792\" n=\"1\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ապարհորդու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104436764","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104436764","n":"25"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"10105-028a"},"n":"ճանապարհորդութի."},"M3531":{"lit":"ճանա<lb xml:id=\"l104372834\" facs=\"#z104372834\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>պարհորդու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>.","line":{"facs":"#z104372833","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104372833","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3531.0286b"},"n":"ճանապարհորդութի."}}
